title: Dull Netherrack
body: I've seen many players that use the Programmer Art style but dont like programmer art's netherrack texure, so they use a resourcepack to remove it. This pack fixes that by replacing the Programmer Art netherack with a more dull recreation that matches better with the new default but is still Programmer Art styled. This pack's texture was made in a similar way to what Mojang did when they made the original netherrack, so the patterns on this pack's textures will still line up with Programmer Art's. Other netherrack related blocks and items are also changed. ![The nether wastes with dull netherrack and it's dependencies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Dq502cy1/images/953a062aa037580c16e972d45433204dd6aed0fc.webp) --- This pack is a 13De+ Addon and is designed to be used on top of both 13De+ and Programmer Art.
